states.name: Endless Ludmilla
states.title: Savior of the Living City
states.description:
No one has arrived late to an inspection in six months. No one would dare. Not with the Queen of Valkyries heading the Vanguard.

As a city under constant siege, Last Bastion can't afford imperfection in its soldiers, as she so frequently reminds them. A single mistake could cost lives. Either her men rise to her standards, or they forfeit their place in her service. Time is a precious resource, and Ludmilla will waste none of it on mercy.

The goddess certainly won't.

states.name: Endless Ludmilla
states.title: Savior of the Living City
states.description:
She knows they call her a tyrant. In the shadows of the city she fights so hard to protect, she knows her people curse her name.

They have their reasons: hunger, cold, exhaustion. She was but a child when the invasion began, but the living complained of the very same in the world before. Perhaps some things never change. Or perhaps, no matter their circumstances, people find a way to be discontent.

It doesn't matter. Let them mutter and curse as much as they please. As long as they survive their wretched nights, she has done her duty.

states.name: Endless Ludmilla
states.title: Savior of the Living City
states.description:
Those who came up through the Vanguard with Ludmilla insist she wasn't always cruel. With every passing day, fewer and fewer believe them. Some have even begun to doubt it themselves.

No woman is born a tyrant, however, least of all a woman so fervently devoted to seeing her people safe. Perhaps in another world, one without the relentless undead siege, she could temper her tactical brilliance with compassion. Perhaps, where she can manage it, she still tries.

She knows well it is better to be loved than feared. But it is better still to be alive.
